allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Implement Phase 1 MVP of TSS PPM Generator

Features implemented:
- React 18 frontend with Vite build system
- 9-grid performance scoring (WHAT-axis x HOW-axis)
- Multi-language support (EN, NL, ES) with flag icons
- Hold-to-dictate voice input using local Whisper server
- DOCX report generation
- Session-based auto-save with 14-day retention
- Drag-and-drop goal reordering
- VETO rule for competency scoring

UI improvements:
- Pink gradient background with magenta accents
- SVG flag icons for language selector
- Visual feedback for recording/processing states
- Error tooltips for voice input failures
- Version label display

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git merge feature/browser-whisper --no-ff -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Merge feature/browser-whisper: Add browser-based Whisper transcription

Major feature: Browser-based speech-to-text using Transformers.js

New features:
- WhisperContext for shared model loading across components
- WebGPU/WASM support with automatic fallback
- Progress tracking for model download (~150MB)
- Server fallback when browser Whisper unavailable
- WAV conversion in browser with webm fallback

Technical changes:
- Add @huggingface/transformers dependency
- Add WhisperProvider to app and test utilities
- Refactor useVoiceInput to use shared context
- Update Docker config (1 worker, 300s timeout, 4G memory)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git merge dependabot/docker/node-25-alpine --no-ff -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
deps(docker): bump node from 20-alpine to 25-alpine

Upgrades the frontend build container to Node.js 25.

Node 25 features:
- V8 engine upgraded to 14.1
- Web Storage enabled by default
- Performance improvements

Low risk: Only affects build container, not runtime.
All tests pass on updated branch.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
